name: abe-yells-at
description: Create animated stickers of Grandpa Abe Simpson yelling at your logo

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --format esm --target node --external @napi-rs/canvas && bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.cjs --format cjs --target node --external @napi-rs/canvas && bun build src/cli.ts --outfile dist/cli.js --format esm --target node --external @napi-rs/canvas && bun build src/browser.ts --outfile dist/browser.js --format esm --target browser --external @jsquash/webp --external @napi-rs/canvas && tsgo --emitDeclarationOnly

author: riccardo.lol
